name: Extract medical entities from a clinical encounter note
prompt: Read clinical_note.txt containing a clinical encounter note. Extract all medical entities into structured format. For each entity identify: (1) the text as it appears in the note, (2) the entity type (condition, medication, lab_result, vital_sign, procedure), (3) whether it is negated (e.g. 'denies nausea' → negated=true, 'no heart failure' → negated=true), (4) for medications: extract dose, unit, route, frequency as additional fields, (5) for lab results: extract value and unit as additional fields. Write entities.json as an array of entity objects.

criteria.description: Key conditions identified with correct type
Negation correctly detected for negated entities
Lab results extracted with numeric values

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
